feedback.text: I'd like to add video game preservation to the list of issues that should be addressed. The large amount of signatures in the stop killing games initiative show that a there's a significant interest in giving this medium a way to still be available in the future. Considering that only european citizens had the opportunity to sign that initiative, there's very likely a much larger interest in this topic than is visible through SKG. So Europe has the chance to act as a rolemodel for consumer rights and set a standard, that will inevitably have a positive global impact.
